title: GitHub - unmask-sh/unmask: Self-hosted JA4 bot challenge for stock nginx & Apache — search-bot safe by design. PoW + behavioral CAPTCHA, RPM/DEB/APK packages.
excerpt: Self-hosted JA4 bot challenge for stock nginx & Apache — search-bot safe by design. PoW + behavioral CAPTCHA, RPM/DEB/APK packages. - unmask-sh/unmask
content_html:
The bot challenge that respects search engines. JA4 TLS fingerprint + behavioral checks.

Website: https://unmask.sh/

unmask is a self-hosted bot management gateway for nginx and Apache. It combines JA4 TLS fingerprinting with behavioral checks to distinguish legitimate search / AI crawlers from disguised scrapers, with search-bot preservation as the default posture.

Features

  • Two-stage search-bot rescue — UA list + official IP range double-check. Designed not to break Googlebot / GPTBot / ClaudeBot.
  • JA4 fingerprint — Computed from the TLS handshake. Exposes headless Chromium / Puppeteer / Playwright through their UA disguise.
  • Behavioral CAPTCHA — 5-axis score from mouseTrail / scroll / window-size. Harder to defeat than a plain checkbox or PoW.
  • Community Bans — Anonymous BAN feed shared across installs. 5-tier confidence score combines heuristic + AI judge. Pulling the shared list is ON by default (CAPTCHA-only enforcement, so a mismatched human still passes; flip subscribe_mode off to disconnect); submitting your own reports is opt-in (country is tagged by default — opt out in settings). GDPR by design (= per-day salted IP hashes, 30-day prune, raw IPs never stored).
  • Built-in admin UI — dashboard / hunt / abuse signals / settings. bcrypt + cookie session + CSRF + per-IP login rate-limit.
  • Two deploy modes — native nginx dynamic module (~0.05 ms post-cookie) or forward-auth fallback with a shipped example for Apache (the check endpoint speaks the standard forward-auth contract, so any HTTP server can wire it the same way).
  • Web Bot Auth + Privacy Pass (opt-in) — RFC 9421 HTTP Message Signatures (ed25519 / RSA-PSS) and Privacy Pass / Apple PAT (RFC 9577/9578). Signed AI agents (Anthropic / OpenAI / etc.) and attested clients pass through without a challenge. Off by default behind an Advanced switch, since the ecosystem is still small.

Install

Official install guide: https://unmask.sh/install/

rpm / deb / apk packages, per-HTTP-server snippets, and an install wizard — step by step.

Docs

Official docs: https://unmask.sh/docs/

Mode selection (native / forward-auth), JA4 via load balancer, per-server config examples, FAQ.

Contributing

See CONTRIBUTING.md.

Status

Released. Signed rpm / deb / apk for x86_64 + arm64, an install wizard, and both deploy modes (native nginx module + forward-auth for Apache) are shipping. It runs in production on the author's own sites.

Still 0.x: configuration may change between minor versions.

Security reports (see SECURITY.md) get priority response. Bug reports, documentation fixes, and PRs are reviewed regularly.

License

Apache 2.0. See LICENSE / NOTICE.

sentences.zh: 由于生态系统仍然很小，因此高级开关后默认关闭。

content_html_zh:
尊重搜索引擎的机器人挑战。 JA4 TLS 指纹+行为检查。

网站：https://unmask.sh/

unmask 是一个用于 nginx 和 Apache 的自托管机器人管理网关。 它将 JA4 TLS 指纹识别与行为检查相结合，以区分合法的搜索/人工智能爬虫和伪装的抓取工具，并将搜索机器人保留作为默认姿势。

特征

  • 两阶段搜索机器人救援——UA列表+官方IP范围双重检查。 旨在不破坏 Googlebot / GPTBot / ClaudeBot。
  • JA4 指纹 — 根据 TLS 握手计算得出。 通过 UA 伪装暴露无头 Chromium/Puppeteer/Playwright。
  • 行为验证码 — 来自 mouseTrail / 滚动 / 窗口大小的 5 轴得分。 比普通的复选框或 PoW 更难被击败。
  • 社区禁令 — 跨安装共享的匿名 BAN 源。 5级置信度评分结合启发式+AI判断。 默认情况下，拉取共享列表是打开的（仅强制执行验证码，因此不匹配的人员仍然可以通过；关闭 subscribe_mode 以断开连接）；提交您自己的报告是选择加入（默认情况下标记国家/地区 - 在设置中选择退出）。 GDPR 的设计（= 每天加盐 IP 哈希值、30 天修剪、从不存储原始 IP）。
  • 内置管理 UI — 仪表板/狩猎/滥用信号/设置。 bcrypt + cookie 会话 + CSRF + 每个 IP 登录速率限制。
  • 两种部署模式 - 本机 nginx 动态模块（cookie 后约 0.05 毫秒）或带有 Apache 附带示例的前向身份验证回退（检查端点采用标准前向身份验证合约，因此任何 HTTP 服务器都可以以相同的方式连接它）。
  • Web Bot 身份验证 + 隐私通行证（选择加入）— RFC 9421 HTTP 消息签名 (ed25519 / RSA-PSS) 和隐私通行证 / Apple PAT (RFC 9577/9578)。 已签名的 AI 代理（Anthropic / OpenAI / 等）和经过验证的客户端可以顺利通过。 由于生态系统仍然很小，因此高级开关后默认关闭。

安装

官方安装指南：https://unmask.sh/install/

rpm / deb / apk 包、每个 HTTP 服务器片段和安装向导 - 一步一步。

Docs

官方文档：https://unmask.sh/docs/

模式选择（本机/转发身份验证）、通过负载均衡器的 JA4、每服务器配置示例、常见问题解答。

贡献

请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md。

地位

释放。 适用于 x86_64 + arm64 的签名 rpm / deb / apk、安装向导以及两种部署模式（本机 nginx 模块 + Apache 的转发验证）均已发货。 它在作者自己的网站上运行。

仍然是 0.x：配置可能会在次要版本之间发生变化。

安全报告（请参阅 SECURITY.md）获得优先响应。 定期审查错误报告、文档修复和 PR。

执照

阿帕奇2.0。 请参阅许可/通知。
